headline: Willis: Food industry faces mounting risks and falling confidence in risk management in 2026
summary: LONDON, July 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Fears over food safety and health have risen sharply, with almost half of companies (45%) naming this among their biggest risks, up from 29% in 2024, amid growing concern over ultra-processed foods and rising litigation exposure. That’s according to the Global Food, Beverage and Agriculture Risk Report 2026, published today by Willis, a WTW business (NASDAQ: WTW). headline: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Could Be 13% Below Fair Value On Its Modelling Platform Update
summary: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) has updated its RiskAgility Financial Modeller platform for life and health insurers, adding GPU execution options that aim to cut modelling costs and improve flexibility in capital and risk analysis workflows. See our latest analysis for Willis Towers Watson. At a share price of $292.58, Willis Towers Watson has seen a 7 day share price return of 6.38% and a 30 day share price return of 13.35%, in contrast with a share price decline of 10.33% year to date, while...

headline: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Buys Redefind And Re Enters Reinsurance With Bain
summary: Willis Towers Watson agreed to acquire Redefind, adding insurance products focused on crypto and digital assets. It also entered a reinsurance joint venture with Bain Capital, marking a return to the reinsurance market. These moves reshape NasdaqGS:WTW's business mix across digital risk coverage and large scale risk transfer. Willis Towers Watson is pushing into new territory with its Redefind acquisition and reinsurance joint venture at a time when the stock is trading around $292.58...
